name: Rand Paul
subject: now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

If you need a big reason to support me in my
run Senate, I want you to really think of why a Republican
majority is more important now that ever before.
With the vacancy in the Supreme Court caused
by the sudden death of beloved Justice Scalia, the Senate is the
last stronghold for liberty and the only safeguard from Obama's
dream activist court.
I've vowed to block any nominee without an
originalist philosophy, but if the Republicans lose the majority
in November -- my voice won't really matter.
It won't even matter if the GOP wins the
White House.
Here's why:
While the Constitution mandates the new
Congress begins January 3rd, 2017, President Obama is still in
Office until January 20, 2017.
That means they have two weeks for the
President to send a nominee and with a Democrat majority, the
Senate could apply the 'nuclear option' and vote in the nominee
with a simple majority.
That could change the course of history and
set America on a terrible path of liberal judicial activism.
I cannot stress this enough, Patriot, winning
the Senate this November is more important now than ever and a
win for me will put us one step closer to making this happen.
I need your help to do everything I can to
get to the Senate for another term and make sure the GOP
maintains the majority.
Will you stand with me?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Nikki Haley, Governor of South Carolina
subject: My endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Wednesday night, I announced my endorsement of Marco Rubio for President.
I did not make this decision lightly or quickly. I've looked at all of the candidates running for president: their records, their experience, and their plans for the future, and I'm saying this with certainty: **Marco Rubio is the leader we need in the White House.**
---
| | [**Peter, Join Nikki Haley in endorsing Marco >>>** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)
---
| Marco Rubio will stand up for not only the citizens of South Carolina but every American. He will fight to protect the lives of the unborn, cut taxes for working Americans, and keep us safe. Peter, we are all in this race together. Our nation's future is on the line in this election and we need a leader with a conservative vision for how to make the future bright again. Marco Rubio has that vision, but he needs our help to win. He is in a heated election that is only going to get tougher \-- that's why our support today is so critical.
**[Will you join me in supporting Marco Rubio today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)**
---
| | [**Peter, Join Nikki Haley in endorsing Marco >>>** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)
---
| **[Your contribution, no matter the size, will go immediately towards Marco 's final and critical get-out-the-vote efforts here in South Carolina.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)** As a Governor, I know how tough it can be to fight for conservative reforms -- but I also know our country can't thrive without them. Marco has shown his ability to fight for important reforms in the Senate, too, like finally bringing some degree of accountability to the VA. As a mother, I agree with Marco that the family is the most important institution in our society. We need our next president to be one who values families and creates opportunities for them to grow rather than burdening them with unfair taxes. Marco has been a stalwart fighter for families and will keep up that fight as President. I also want our next president to be one who values all Americans, and brings our conservative message to them, and I know South Carolinians do too. I know no better leader to do that than Marco Rubio. Peter, we cannot afford to waste another moment -- our country deserves and desperately needs Marco Rubio as our next President. **[Will you join me in endorsing him today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46265786:Ja0j2JrkN:m:1:1349778030:5B93B299677E334477FCDD41E2B2383C:r)** Sincerely, Nikki HaleyGovernor of South Carolina
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: 2 days, and 2 urgent things to share...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33630036:smhEsmCNB:m:1:876315805:507E514370294D6D34268879D7A93FA4:r)
---

Peter,

With 2 days to go until the South Carolina primary, I have 2 urgent things to share with you.

First, I was honored yesterday to receive the endorsement of Congressman Andy Harris of Maryland. He is a physician, a veteran and a member of the conservative House Freedom Caucus. In his endorsement he said:

_[Dr. Carson] will restore America to greatness -- not as a punchline in a campaign, but as a belief in returning America to its Constitutional roots. What we saw in the debate last Saturday reminds us just how much we need someone thoughtful like Dr. Carson in the White House._

Second, my closing statement from the last debate has gone viral online, which means it's been resonating with a lot more people than just Rep. Harris. My team has turned it into an online ad and we're trying to send it to every single targeted voter in South Carolina before Saturday.

[**I urge you to watch our video below and donate $2 or more to fund our targeting effort.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33630036:smhEsmCNB:m:1:876315805:507E514370294D6D34268879D7A93FA4:r)

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33630036:smhEsmCNB:m:1:876315805:507E514370294D6D34268879D7A93FA4:r)
---

Since the debate, we've been seeing a rise in support in South Carolina. This, in addition to the fact that I still have the highest likability rating of all the candidates, is very encouraging news because tens of thousands of voters are still undecided.

We believe strongly that this targeting effort will help to make a difference, and [so I humbly ask for your urgent support right now](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33630036:smhEsmCNB:m:1:876315805:507E514370294D6D34268879D7A93FA4:r). If we can raise just $2 or more from a few thousand people, we will have the resources that we need.

Thank you so much for your continued support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson
**

**" Supreme Court fight adds to stakes in PA Senate race"**
_\-- Philadelphia Inquirer, 2/15/2016_
It's beyond despicable, Friend. Pat Toomey and Senate Republicans are committed to BLOCKING any Supreme Court nominee named by President Obama -- and completely ignoring their obligation to serve the American people. This is nothing but a power-grab by GOP obstructionists who want to prevent President Obama from doing his job and appointing a new Supreme Court justice. **And Senator Pat Toomey has jumped on the bandwagon with Ted Cruz and Mitch McConnell in demanding that the Senate wait until after the 2016 election to have a functional Supreme Court!** **It 's never been clearer: We MUST turn the Senate back to blue and end this political obstructionism once and for all. If Toomey and Senate Republicans get their way, there will be no ninth judge to break a tie in any of these historic rulings. America can't afford to wait for a new Supreme Court nominee, and we certainly can't afford to wait for Pat Toomey to do his job as Senator. **We need a leader in Washington who puts Pennsylvania and the nation ahead of partisan brawling.[TODAY: Contribute $5 or whatever you can to elect Katie and send new leadership to Washington.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4946961086927601664/-8899653823404965888?refcode=e20160218&refcode2=e20160218nd&amount=5)** Sincerely, Secure the Senate

In the coming months, the Supreme Court will rule on critical issues like reproductive health, voting rights, unions, and climate change. If Toomey and Senate Republicans get their way, there will be no ninth judge to break a tie in any of these historic rulings. America can't afford to wait for a new Supreme Court nominee, and we certainly can't afford to wait for Pat Toomey to do his job as Senator. We need a leader in Washington who puts Pennsylvania and the nation ahead of partisan brawling. Sincerely, Secure the Senate | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

subject: What they mean

body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, in the last 24 hours, there have been several important polls released.

• Two of them show that in a head-to-head matchup, I'm the Republican most likely to defeat Hillary Clinton. They show victories by 11 and 9 points!

• One shows that we're tied for third with Rubio nationally and ahead of Bush - a clear result of our growing momentum.

• Another shows that we're up to third place in South Carolina and ahead of both Cruz and Bush.

**There are so many polls out but there are two key takeaways from them:**

**1.** Our momentum is real and it's growing. We're running a 50-state campaign and we're ready to compete well beyond SC/NV and the early March states.

**2.** Our positive message is working. Our strong finish in New Hampshire proved that while the other candidates sling mud at each other, we're the only campaign offering a positive vision for our future and common-sense solutions to our challenges.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33636472:sun0omCNH:m:1:958431888:C450BA91AF9CBEBA5446892C8C37F3E2:r)

We're just two days away from the South Carolina primary and five days from the Nevada Caucus. On March 1st, more than a dozen other states will vote or caucus. Now is the time to chip in to keep our momentum going strong!

**[Please consider chipping in right now to help!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33636472:sun0omCNH:m:1:958431888:C450BA91AF9CBEBA5446892C8C37F3E2:r)**

If we want to defeat Hillary Clinton, we'll need a candidate who can unify the country and offer a message that lifts Americans. [Chip in right now to support our campaign if you agree!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33636472:sun0omCNH:m:1:958431888:C450BA91AF9CBEBA5446892C8C37F3E2:r)

**Don 't forget, no Republican has EVER won the White House without winning in Ohio and I will defeat Hillary in the Buckeye State**.

[Peter, help us finish strong in South Carolina!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33636472:sun0omCNH:m:1:958431888:C450BA91AF9CBEBA5446892C8C37F3E2:r)

Thank you for your support.

body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46272904:JVEsaJrXN:m:1:1349778030:31F399BACA7CBDAF50D8B041B9FEE04A:r)
---
| | | | Peter, You have been one of Marco's most loyal supporters from Day One. Because of your friendship and loyalty, I wanted to send you a special update about our campaign and what our next steps are. Peter, I wish you could be here with our team in South Carolina. The atmosphere surrounding our campaign is electric: We have hundreds of volunteers across South Carolina knocking on doors, making phone calls, and talking with voters about our campaign's conservative message. Marco has had hundreds of people at every town hall he's hosted recently -- on Wednesday, he held three separate events, before his appearance at the CNN town hall last night. And, while his warm-up team of Tim Scott and Trey Gowdy is pretty entertaining, we know why South Carolinians are flocking to Marco's events: because they want to hear about his optimistic, conservative vision for a New American Century. That's why the state's hugely popular governor, Nikki Haley, just backed Marco too, appearing with him on the trail last night. She agrees that his conservative message is the way forward for Republicans, and the only way to beat Hillary.
We cannot afford to let our momentum down. The consequences of this election are too grave. It is now or never, Peter. Marco's opponents and the media are going to judge our results in South Carolina and use it to predict our success moving forward.
---

---
Friend,

I'm going to keep this short because we are running out of time. If you haven't seen it on TV yet -- you will shortly.

This is certain to get wall-to-wall coverage across the news media.

You see: **with fewer than 36 hours until voting starts in South Carolina, Donald Trump has launched his biggest attack yet** \-- a desperate last minute attack to mislead the media and distract voters.

Friend, the truth speaks for itself and ALWAYS comes out...so I'm not worried about Donald's ridiculous attacks, _but I do need additional funds to respond._

Time is critical, and with the stakes this high, [**I cannot afford to lose even a SECOND!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638943:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

Here's the situation: Donald is threatening to file yet another frivolous lawsuit -- basically claiming he didn't say any of the things he is literally on video saying. **AND as I write this email to you,_I'm still $410,750 short_ of my budget to shoot down his attacks and win the South Carolina primary.**

That's why I'm turning to you -- one of my closest campaign supporters -- again. **I know it's a lot to process, but will you help me set the record straight by using one of the secure links below?**

_**I truly need your help within the next few hours to turn this situation around!!**_

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $5 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638944:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638945:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638946:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $250 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638947:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $500 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638948:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $2700 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33638949:WOdwimCNA:m:1:1104269936:582AA9F6CF77BAFCB5FB1CD11BEB472A:r)

Donald's lawsuit has no chance of succeeding, but he knows that.

His real strategy is to divert attention away from his support for abortion, universal healthcare, gun-control, and his numerous personal contributions to Nancy Pelosi, Harry Reid, and Hillary Clinton.

**Donald, rattled by my surge in the polls** (I have just overtaken him as the front runner in a NBC national poll), has decided the best way to boost his campaign and distract voters from his record is to tear me down.

If the record is not set straight, he might get away with it...**and voting starts in just 36 hours.**

So, I need your immediate help.

You can make a HUGE impact on this campaign in the next few hours with an IMMEDIATE contribution -- no matter how small.

With your personal contribution, you'll also be sending a big message to Donald Trump that tearing others down and misleading voters is not the best way to unite conservatives and make America great again.

Friend, help me set the record straight on Donald's false attacks. Together, we will reignite liberty in America.

**This only happens with your help though...**

Heidi and I would consider it a personal favor if you would make an urgent contribution in the next few hours.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

I've always been fond of the saying: "your reach should exceed your grasp, or what's a heaven for?"
Over the past three weeks, our grassroots navy was asked to obtain the required 2,000 signatures to place my name on the ballot for Senate.
_Your reach exceeded that grasp_ , **and yesterday we filed 12,433 signatures from 55 counties****across****Pennsylvania!** Thank you, so very much, to everybody who helped us reach _six times_ beyond our grasp!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719759/3476a20e/c592aa5/27453056/999906014/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0218FBb2&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**With our ground war unmatched, I now need your help getting on the airwaves. **[That's why I'm setting another big reach: $12,433 - that's $1 for each signature we collected - by week's end. Please contribute today toward our grasp!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719759/3476a20e/c592aa5/27453055/999906014/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0218FBp1&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
**I'd ask each of you to pick a county from below and match its signature number to a dollar amount.** Take Adams County and contribute $214 or 21.40; or Armstrong County and contribute $70 or $7.
$12,433 is a big number, but "your reach should exceed your grasp, or what's a heaven for!"

body:

subject: [Nevada Update] Clinton 48% - Sanders 47%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we started our campaign, we were down 37 points in Nevada. We had no money and no organization. No one gave us a chance. It was supposed to be part of the "Clinton Firewall" in case we did well in Iowa and New Hampshire (which we did).
Now, look at this -- what could be the final public poll before Saturday's Nevada caucus.
**CNN - Nevada Caucus** (February 17, 2016)
**Clinton:** 48%
**Sanders:** 47%
It's SO CLOSE. And if we win in Nevada, we have a chance to create a real domino effect that swings a number of Super Tuesday states in our favor. We can all see the path to victory -- let's bring it home:
[**Your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign, right now, could mean the difference between victory and defeat in Nevada, and for our political revolution in the Democratic primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full")
Here's the truth: the political and financial establishment in this country are TERRIFIED of our success. That's why the Clinton campaign has ramped up their high-dollar fundraising efforts to unprecedented levels -- holding an average of more than one event per day recently! Can you imagine? It's just staggering...
But Bernie doesn't go around begging millionaires and billionaires for money. And that's part of the reason we are doing so well on this campaign. Not only have people had more than ENOUGH of the influence of the billionaire class on our democracy, but because of your continued support, Bernie can stay on the campaign trail talking to voters.
**Your $3 contributiontoday will help deliver victory in Nevada, which we believe will swing a number of Super Tuesday states in our favor. Make it here:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/lets-win-nevada**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full")
We've said from the start that we are building the kind of campaign that has the power to win the Democratic primary, the White House, and take back our country back from the billionaire class. People should not underestimate us.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160218full")**

| Dear Friend,

The Supreme Court's awful decision in Citizens United passed by a vote of 5 to 4. That decision unleashed torrents of big-money Super PACs and eroded our democracy.

The new court vacancy provides an opportunity for a new Justice to help overturn that disgraceful ruling. But Mitch McConnell is standing in the way.

[**We need to elect Chris to be part of a Democratic Senate majority that STOPS Mitch McConnell.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cfb/70cdc2ba/47c2467a/396aa5c/1057211970/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stopmcconnellcvh?refcode=em021716&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+elect+Chris+to+be+part+of+a+D&utm_campaign=em021716&source=em021716")

name: Trump MidAtlantic
subject: Trump Team MidAtlantic News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Team MidAtlantic Team Update

**12 Days!**
**There are 12 Days until the Virginia Primary!**
Virginia is a big test for Mr. Trump. Any candidate that wants to win the general election MUST do well in the purple states. Virginia is the first large purple state.
What will you do to Get Out The Vote? Read the update below for effective ideas and events!

**In this Edition of the MidAtlantic News:**

1\. Phone Banking
2\. Yard Signs
3\. South Carolina Results Watch Parties
4\. VA Election Day Volunteers
5\. VA Mass Meetings & Conventions
6\. District of Columbia
7\. Maryland
8\. West Virginia
**9\. New Virginia Poll Numbers!**
10\. Thank You

\----------------------------------------

**1\. Phone Banking**
\- Phone banking is the most important activity.
\- Our system allows you to phone bank from home or at a call center.
\- E-mail [MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com) to get a user name, password and instructions.
\- Visit [https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvafortrump%2Fevents&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=1) for phone bank locations.
## **15 minutes a Day makes a YUGE Difference!**
**2\. Yard Signs**
\- We have enough yard signs to blanket the state!
\- Stop by any of our Phone Banks to pick up yard signs for you and your neighbors
\- Locations are listed here: [https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvafortrump%2Fevents&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=2)
**3\. South Carolina Results Watch Parties**
\- Phone banker participants on Saturday evening are invited to watch the South Carolina Results roll in with us.
\- Food and drink are included
\- Locations include Richmond, Virginia Beach, Newport News, and McLean
\- **Price of Admission is Phone Banking. We have elections to win!**
\- E-mail [MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com) for an invitation
**4\. Virginia Election Day Volunteers**
\- Volunteers are needed the night of Feb 29 to deliver yard signs to the precincts
\- Volunteers are necessary to Get Out The Vote on Election Day, March 1.
\- You can be an Election Day volunteer from home – Especially if you live in DC, MD or WV.
\- Sign up at [https://virginiaprimaryfortrump.eventbrite.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvirginiaprimaryfortrump.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=3)
**5\. Virginia Mass Meetings, District Conventions & State Conventions**
\- After the primary, we still have to elect the National Delegates from Virginia.
\- To get direction to help elect National Delegates who support Mr. Trump, register at [https://virginiadelegatesfortrump.eventbrite.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvirginiadelegatesfortrump.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=4)
**6\. District of Columbia**
\- The District of Columbia Republican Party Convention, where you can vote for Mr. Trump is Saturday, March 12, at the Lowes Madison Hotel, 1177 15th St NW, Washington, DC 20005.
\- Mark you calendar AND recruit DC Republicans who support Mr. Trump to attend.
\- You must be a registered Republican to vote. Change your registration here: [https://www.vote4dc.com/Voter/Voter/CommonVoter](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.vote4dc.com%2FVoter%2FVoter%2FCommonVoter&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=5)
**7\. Maryland**
\- The Voter Registration Deadline for the April 26th primary is April 5th.
\- You must be a registered Republican to vote for Mr. Trump.
\- Look up your registration here: [https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/votersearch](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvoterservices.elections.maryland.gov%2Fvotersearch&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=6)
\- Change your voter registration here: [https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvoterservices.elections.maryland.gov%2FOnlineVoterRegistration%2FInstructionsStep1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=7)
\- Request an Absentee Ballot here: [https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvoterservices.elections.maryland.gov%2FOnlineVoterRegistration%2FInstructionsStep1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=8)
**8\. West Virginia**
\- The Voter Registration Deadline for the May 15th primary is April 19th.
\- You must be a registered Republican to vote for Mr. Trump.
\- Look up your registration here: [https://services.sos.wv.gov/Elections/Voter/AmIRegisteredToVote](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fservices.sos.wv.gov%2FElections%2FVoter%2FAmIRegisteredToVote&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=9)
\- Change your voter registration here: [https://ovr.sos.wv.gov/Register](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fovr.sos.wv.gov%2FRegister&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=10)
\- Request an Absentee Ballot here: [http://www.sos.wv.gov/elections/Vote/absentee/Pages/default.aspx](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.wv.gov%2Felections%2FVote%2Fabsentee%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=11)
**9\. Virginia Polling**
It is vitally important that we do not let up. Polls can be wrong. We have to Get Out The Vote to win. That being said, 2 polls in Virginia were released this week:

**
[Overtime Politics](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fovertimepolitics.com%2Ftrump-leads-rubio-by-14-in-virginia-33-19%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=12)**:
**Donald Trump – 33%**
Marco Rubio – 19%
John Kasich – 14%
Ted Cruz – 12%
Jeb Bush – 8%
Ben Carson – 8%
Unknown – 6%
**[Christopher Newport University](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailyprogress.com%2Fnewsvirginian%2Fnews%2Fcnu-poll-has-trump-clinton-leading-in-virginia%2Farticle_dd2247c6-d4db-11e5-912d-f336c4592f01.html&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_2_18&n=13): **
**Donald Trump – 28%**
Marco Rubio – 22%
Ted Cruz – 19%
John Kasich – 7%
Ben Carson – 7%
Jeb Bush – 4%
**10\. THANK YOU!!!**
We don’t say it often enough. Thank you! Thank you for volunteering! Thank you for playing your part!

**Thank you for helping Make America Great Again!**
-Team MidAtlantic

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

---

South Carolina Results Watch Parties \- Phone banker participants on Saturday evening are invited to watch the South Carolina Results roll in with us. \- Food and drink are included \- Locations include Richmond, Virginia Beach, Newport News, and McLean \- Price of Admission is Phone Banking. We have elections to win! \- E-mail mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com for an invitation 4\. Virginia Election Day Volunteers \- Volunteers are needed the night of Feb 29 to deliver yard signs to the precincts \- Volunteers are necessary to Get Out The Vote on Election Day, March 1. \- You can be an Election Day volunteer from home – Especially if you live in DC, MD or WV. \- Sign up at 5\. Virginia Mass Meetings, District Conventions & State Conventions \- After the primary, we still have to elect the National Delegates from Virginia. \- To get direction to help elect National Delegates who support Mr. Trump, register at 6\. District of Columbia \- The District of Columbia Republican Party Convention, where you can vote for Mr. Trump is Saturday, March 12, at the Lowes Madison Hotel, 1177 15th St NW, Washington, DC 20005. \- Mark you calendar AND recruit DC Republicans who support Mr. Trump to attend. \- You must be a registered Republican to vote. Change your registration here: 7\. Maryland \- The Voter Registration Deadline for the April 26th primary is April 5th. \- You must be a registered Republican to vote for Mr. Trump. \- Look up your registration here: \- Change your voter registration here: \- Request an Absentee Ballot here: 8\. West Virginia \- The Voter Registration Deadline for the May 15th primary is April 19th. \- You must be a registered Republican to vote for Mr. Trump. \- Look up your registration here: \- Change your voter registration here: \- Request an Absentee Ballot here: 9\. Virginia Polling It is vitally important that we do not let up. Polls can be wrong. We have to Get Out The Vote to win. That being said, 2 polls in Virginia were released this week: : Donald Trump – 33% Marco Rubio – 19% John Kasich – 14% Ted Cruz – 12% Jeb Bush – 8% Ben Carson – 8% Unknown – 6% : Donald Trump – 28% Marco Rubio – 22% Ted Cruz – 19% John Kasich – 7% Ben Carson – 7% Jeb Bush – 4% 10\. THANK YOU!!! We don’t say it often enough. Thank you! Thank you for volunteering! Thank you for playing your part! Thank you for helping Make America Great Again! -Team MidAtlantic Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

name: Melissa Gallahan, HillaryClinton.com
subject: We’re ahead, but we’re not slowing down:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
| Friend --

With less than two weeks to the Virginia primary, Hillary’s leading in the most recent statewide poll (12 points over Bernie!). And that’s no accident -- it’s a testament to this incredible team that we’ve assembled, and all the work we’ve done reaching out to voters.

**Since getting started, we’ve accomplished something pretty remarkable:**
* We’ve hosted over 450 events statewide
* We recruited thousands of volunteers to help get voters ready to turn out on Primary Day
* We have phone banks and canvasses scheduled seven days a week (look for one in your area **[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**)

But we can't take anything for granted with just 12 days until folks vote in Virginia -- you can be sure Bernie’s team isn’t wasting a minute of the time left. **We still have a lot to do before March 1st, and you should be a part of it! Will you sign up to volunteer to help Hillary win the Virginia primary?**
| [ | [**Count me in**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Whatever your talents, strengths, and interests are, there is an important role you can play, and Hillary needs your help to secure a win. Let's make history right here in the Commonwealth.

Thanks,

Melissa

Melissa Gallahan
Virginia Statewide Organizing Lead
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3NjMwMTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzMDgxMjI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Saturday: Join the political revolution in College Park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
# [You're invited: Organizing rally for Bernie in College Park](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4wtg)
Friend -
Our political revolution has come this far because countless Bernie supporters just like you are doing the work that wins elections: Volunteering to talk to voters and spread Bernie's message.
But from here things get much more difficult. After Nevada and South Carolina, we have to organize to win in March - starting with the 12 caucuses and primaries that happen on Super Tuesday, March 1.
To grow our movement to the scale we need to win in March, we asked some of our top volunteers to host "barnstorm" organizing rallies on Saturday.
At these events, the event hosts will deliver a special update from the national campaign, talk about our plan to win in March, and plug you into a voter contact program locally. Plus, you'll get to spend the day with other Bernie supporters and watch the results from the Nevada caucuses come in!
A Bernie volunteer is planning an event in College Park - will you attend and find out how you can help Bernie win in March?
**[Barnstorm Organizing Rally for Bernie](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4wtg)**
Saturday, February 20th in College Park
**[RSVP to Attend»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4wtg)**
**[Or click here to see all upcoming events near you.](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=other "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=other")**
If you're already involved locally, this is a great opportunity to get the latest from the national campaign. If you're looking for a chance to get involved and get to work for Bernie, this is it.
We're counting on you to make it to a barnstorm on Saturday. There's never been a more important time to get to work for Bernie.
In solidarity,
\- Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
